title: eleocharis calyptrata
intro: Eleocharis calyptrata, also known as the umbrella sedge or umbrella club-rush, is a type of perennial plant belonging to the family Cyperaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Eleocharis calyptrata include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating various skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures for internal or external use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
